action.reasoning: Observation: SocialNavSeekSuccess does NOT check must_call_stop - it simply returns nav_pos_succ = (following_step >= 500). The facing check is dot product > 0.5 (≈60°). My controller gets avg_dist=4.4m and only 53 safe steps. Analysis: Controller is too timid - needs faster approach, better zone maintenance. The facing threshold is 60° not 28.6°. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with aggressive controller, submit eval.
action.command: cd /workspace && python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /workspace/data --checkpoint /workspace/checkpoints/baseline --output /workspace/test_output.json 2>&1 | tail -60
